home.title: GoalsGuild Coach
home.subtitle: Transform your goals into reality with gamification and AI
home.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal productivity assistant with gamification. Set goals, complete quests, and earn XP!

featureDescriptions.objectives: Set objectives with NLP and track your progress

coach.title: Productivity Coach
coach.subtitle: Chat with your coach to define goals and achieve your targets
coach.welcome: Hi! I'm your GoalsGuild coach. What do you want to work on today? A goal? A target?
coach.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
coach.unauthorizedRedirect: Unauthorized. Your session expired. Redirecting to login...
coach.genericErrorTryAgain: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.
coach.tip1: Be specific: "I want to run 5km" instead of "I want to exercise"
coach.tip2: Talk about what you want (not what you don't want)
coach.tip3: The coach will guide you through the process
coach.inputPlaceholderDesktop: Type your message and press Enter...
coach.personalitySubtitle: Choose how the coach talks to you

objectives.title: My Objectives
objectives.subtitle: Define and track your goals using NLP
objectives.title: Title
objectives.nlpPositivePlaceholder: What do you WANT to achieve? (formulate positively)
objectives.nlpPositiveHint: Ex: I want to learn English fluently
objectives.nlpSensoryPlaceholder: What do you SEE, HEAR and FEEL when you achieve this?
objectives.nlpSensoryHint: Ex: I see myself speaking confidently, hear compliments, feel proud
objectives.nlpCompellingPlaceholder: Why is this MOTIVATING for you?
objectives.nlpCompellingHint: Ex: I feel free and confident, this will change my life
objectives.nlpEcologyPlaceholder: What is the POSITIVE IMPACT on other areas of your life?
objectives.nlpEcologyHint: Ex: Will improve my career, I'll have more energy for family
objectives.nlpSelfInitiatedPlaceholder: Is this something UNDER YOUR CONTROL? What will you do?
objectives.nlpSelfInitiatedHint: Ex: I will study 1 hour per day, I am committed
objectives.nlpContextPlaceholder: WHEN, WHERE and WITH WHOM will you do this?
objectives.nlpContextHint: Ex: Every morning, at home, alone
objectives.nlpResourcesPlaceholder: What do you NEED to achieve this? (internal and external)
objectives.nlpResourcesHint: Ex: Discipline, time, online course, family support
objectives.nlpEvidencePlaceholder: How will you KNOW you achieved it?
objectives.nlpEvidenceHint: Ex: When I can maintain a 30-minute conversation in English
objectives.noneFiltered: No objectives found for this filter.
objectives.headerSubtitle: NLP-defined objectives. Convert them to quests, track memory, and configure reminders.
objectives.createQuestConfirm: Create an automatic quest from this objective?
objectives.deleteObjectiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this objective?

quests.title: My Quests
quests.subtitle: Complete quests and earn XP
quests.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
quests.completeMilestoneConfirm: Are you sure you want to complete milestone
quests.milestoneReflectionLabel: Reflection (optional) — it will be saved in objective memory
quests.milestoneReflectionPlaceholder: e.g. What I learned from this step...
quests.createPageSubtitle: Turn your big goal into a completable quest
quests.titleHint: Be specific. "Launch startup" is better than "Work"
quests.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your quest in more detail...
quests.descriptionHint: Help the coach understand context and motivation
quests.targetDateHint: When do you want to complete this quest?
quests.tip1: Be specific about the end result
quests.tip3: Target date should be challenging but achievable
quests.tip4: The coach will help break it into micro-tasks later
quests.generateWithAIDescription: Choose an objective below. The AI will use that objective's memory and history to suggest a quest, milestones, and tasks (avoids duplicating what you've already completed for this objective).
quests.generateWithAIError: Could not generate. Check OPENAI_API_KEY or try again.
quests.generateWithAINoQuest: Could not generate a valid quest. Try again.
quests.chooseObjectiveLabel: Objective to create the quest from

tasks.title: My Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage your daily tasks
tasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
tasks.completeConfirm: Are you sure you want to complete

daily.title: Daily Check-in
daily.subtitle: How are you feeling today?
daily.savedMessage: You already checked in today. Come back tomorrow!
